attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CIA (Common Infections & Afflictions) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled (option A) that the paediatric weight-based dosing sealed in CIA-032 (croup) is acceptable as clinician-administered answer-key content.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CIA casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-GI-03-00214 — SEQ is provisional from source CIA-014; maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-GI-03 bucket.
Age (~52) and sex (male) are NOT stated in the source note; inferred to satisfy the required demographics.age and demographics.sex_at_birth fields — clinician to confirm on review.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is an in-person after-hours encounter that examined the cardiovascular/abdominal systems and clinically excluded ACS. The AI-Doctor-appropriate action was reprojected to recognise that acute chest pain cannot be excluded as cardiac remotely and to arrange urgent in-person ECG/troponin assessment with cardiac safety-netting. Clinician-measured vitals, auscultation, palpation and oropharyngeal findings are sealed in nodes 10/11 with telehealth_limits_for_this_case.

Tiering: correct_baseline_tier set to T4 (urgent in-person ECG/troponin to exclude ACS), NOT the low tier the confirmed reflux diagnosis would carry — this is a narrow, justified telehealth uplift because ACS is a plausible serious mimic that cannot be excluded remotely. minimum_viable_tier_for_pass T3 (urgent-care with ECG). Under-triage to home reflux management (T0–T2) is the critical failure this case probes.

Drug-level AMT/PBS item codes for pantoprazole 40 mg and the antacid/alginate were NOT assigned to avoid emitting a plausible-but-unverified code — flagged for terminology receipt at ingest (§8). PPI dose (40 mg daily, adult) is taken verbatim from the source note; no dose synthesised; patient is an adult so no paediatric-dosing bar applies.
diagnosis_category set to important_not_to_miss and difficulty_tier red_herring_laden to reflect the ACS-mimic / premature-closure trap; the primary condition itself (GORD) is common.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
